question: How do I apply?
answer: Visit our website and fill the online application form. Upload your documents and pay the application fee.

question: What is the application fee?
answer: Rs. 500 for all candidates. Pay online through card, net banking, or UPI.

question: When does admission start?
answer: Admission starts in June every year. Check our website for exact dates.

question: What is the deadline to apply?
answer: The application deadline is usually July 31st. Submit before this date.

question: Can I apply online?
answer: Yes, all applications are online only. No offline applications are accepted.

question: Can I apply for multiple courses?
answer: Yes, you can apply for up to 3 different courses. Pay application fee for each course.

question: Can I withdraw my application?
answer: Yes, within 7 days of submission. Application fee is non-refundable.

question: Do I need to pass 12th?
answer: Yes, you must pass Class 12 or equivalent from any recognized board.

question: What marks do I need?
answer: You need minimum 50% marks in 12th. SC/ST candidates need 45%.

question: What is the age limit?
answer: You must be between 17-25 years old. SC/ST get 5 years extra age relaxation.

question: Can foreigners apply?
answer: Indian citizens and NRI/OCI candidates can apply. Foreign nationals apply separately.

question: Can I apply with disabilities?
answer: Yes, PWD candidates are eligible. Extra time and support are provided.

question: Is caste certificate needed?
answer: Only if you are applying under SC/ST/OBC category. It's optional for general category.

question: Do I need an entrance exam?
answer: Yes, entrance exam is mandatory for most programs.

question: Which exams are accepted?
answer: JEE Main, NEET, CAT, MAT, or our own entrance exam. Check your program requirements.

question: When is the entrance exam?
answer: Usually in August. Date announced 4 weeks in advance on our website.

question: How many questions are there?
answer: 100 multiple choice questions in 3 hours.

question: What's the syllabus?
answer: Physics, Chemistry, and Math (Class 11-12 level). Sample papers available on our website.

question: Can I take exam from abroad?
answer: Yes, exam centers available in major countries. Online exam option also available.

question: What documents do I need?
answer: 10th & 12th mark sheets, pass certificate, entrance exam scorecard, Aadhar, 4 photos, caste certificate (if applicable).

question: Should I upload originals or copies?
answer: Upload scanned copies (PDF/JPG). Bring originals during counseling for verification.

question: Do I need attested documents?
answer: Self-attested copies are okay for online application. Bring originals at counseling.

question: When do I submit documents?
answer: Upload all documents while filling the application form before the deadline.

question: What file size should I upload?
answer: Keep each file under 5 MB in PDF or JPG format. Make sure documents are clear and readable.

question: How is merit list made?
answer: Based on entrance exam score (70%), 12th marks (20%), and category (10%).

question: When will merit list come?
answer: Within 2 weeks of entrance exam. Check your email and admission portal.

question: How will I know if I'm selected?
answer: Check the merit list on our portal using your registration number. Email notification sent too.

question: Will there be multiple merit lists?
answer: Yes, usually 2-4 rounds of merit lists. Keep checking the portal.

question: What if I'm not in first merit list?
answer: You may appear in later merit lists. Check updates on the portal regularly.

question: What is counseling?
answer: Meet our team, verify your documents, and choose your preferred course and branch.

question: When is counseling?
answer: Usually in September. Exact dates announced on the portal.

question: Is counseling mandatory?
answer: Yes, if you're selected, you must attend counseling. Skip it and your seat is cancelled.

question: Can someone else go for counseling?
answer: Yes, a parent or guardian can attend with power of attorney and your ID copy.

question: Where is counseling held?
answer: At our campus and other designated centers in your city. Location sent via email.

question: Can I change my choice later?
answer: Limited changes allowed in spot counseling only. Be careful while choosing.

question: How much is the course fee?
answer: Undergraduate: Rs. 3-5 lakh per year. Postgraduate: Rs. 2-4 lakh per year.

question: How do I pay fees?
answer: Pay 50% at admission, 25% after 3 months, and 25% after 6 months. Online payment available.

question: Are scholarships available?
answer: Yes, merit-based scholarships, need-based aid, and sports scholarships available.

question: Who can get scholarship?
answer: Merit scholarship: 70% marks. Need-based: Family income below Rs. 5 lakh.

question: Can I pay in installments?
answer: Yes, flexible payment plans available. Apply in writing for installment option.

question: Is hostel available?
answer: Yes, separate hostels for boys and girls with WiFi, meals, and sports facilities.

question: What is hostel fee?
answer: Rs. 1-1.5 lakh per year including meals and utilities.

question: How do I get hostel?
answer: Apply after getting admission. Allocation on first-come-first-served basis with merit priority.

question: How long is the course?
answer: Undergraduate: 3-4 years. Postgraduate: 1-2 years.

question: When do classes start?
answer: 3-5 days after admission completion. Date mentioned in your admission letter.

question: How do I contact admission office?
answer: Email: admissions@college.edu.in | Phone: +91-11-XXXX-XXXX | Website: www.college.edu.in

question: Will I get admission letter?
answer: Yes, after you complete counseling and pay fees. Email sent with all details.

question: What if I have more questions?
answer: Contact our admission office via email, phone, or visit our website. Chat support available 9-5 PM.
